mapper.select: SELECT a.*, u.real_name AS auditorName, CASE WHEN a.status = 0 THEN '入驻申请' WHEN a.status = 1 THEN '准予入驻' WHEN a.status = 2 THEN '入驻驳回' WHEN a.status = 4 THEN '申请迁出' WHEN a.status = 3 THEN '准予迁出' ELSE '系统操作' END AS auditAction FROM biz_enterprise_audit a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.auditor_id = u.id WHERE a.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
